name: WFBE_NEURODEF_MIXEDPOS_HEAVY_EAST
notes: MIXED STRONGPOINT (HEAVY, 4 AI) — EAST. Premium all-round crossroads strongpoint with RU/TK kit. Twin DShKs on the front corners angled outward interlock across the frontage; a Metis ATGM between them kills armour down the main approach; a rear Igla covers air and the back. A covered infantry bunker (Bunker/fortified nest) at the rear centre is the fallback fighting position. HBarrier horseshoe on flanks + rear screen gives 360 protection with a bunker-side entrance gap; front open for the guns; forward-flank wire canalizes the assault into the crossfire. Mirrors the WEST strongpoint.

objs.role: DShK (left corner) — arc front-left, interlocks with right
DShK (right corner) — arc front-right, interlocks with left
Metis ATGM — anti-armour down the main approach
Igla — air lane + covers the rear/blind side
COVERED INFANTRY BUNKER — fallback fighting position (rear centre)
forward-left screen (does not block DShK arc)
forward-right screen (does not block DShK arc)
rear wire — closes the far approach
